things.name: White Nile Waterfront
things.description: Juba sits on the White Nile - sit at a riverside bar and watch the world's longest river pass by

things.name: Juba University & Cultural Centre
things.description: University campus with a small museum of South Sudanese culture and history

things.name: Jebel Kujur (Kujur Hill)
things.description: Sacred hill and the highest point near Juba with views of the city and Nile

things.name: Konyo Konyo Market
things.description: Juba's main open-air market with goods from across South Sudan and East Africa

things.name: St Theresa's Cathedral
things.description: The most prominent church in the world's newest country

things.name: Nimule National Park
things.description: White Nile rapids and hippos near the Uganda border

things.name: Mundari Cattle Camps
things.description: Visit the extraordinary Mundari people who sleep beside their long-horned cattle

things.name: Dinka Cultural Village
things.description: Learn about the Dinka - South Sudan's largest ethnic group known for extraordinary cattle culture

things.name: Juba Bridge & Nile Crossing
things.description: Suspension bridge over the White Nile with spectacular sunrise and sunset views

things.name: Kisra (Fermented Flatbread)
things.description: South Sudan's staple - thin sorghum flatbread eaten with vegetable or meat stew
